summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 7→Jul 13 vs Jun 30→Jul 6* · Revenue -21% (978,924 vs 1,241,513 EGP) · Spend -13% · ROAS 5.5 (-9%).
   • CPC: 2.4 → 2.12 EGP (-12%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.27% → 1.02% (-20%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,141 → 1,145 EGP (+0%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 63%* of the move (hurt, -240,018 EGP)  ·  *CPC 36%* of the move (helped, +23,478 EGP)  ·  *AOV 1%* of the move (helped, +3,420 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -20%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-240,018 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -9%.
     Revenue -21% because spend -13%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BBG PJS lebleb*, its CVR went 7.14%→0.97% on 4,556 EGP spend (~49% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 7→Jul 13 vs Jun 30→Jul 6* · Revenue +193% (153,547 vs 52,393 EGP) · Spend +138% · ROAS 4.15 (+23%).
   • CPC: 8.21 → 9.86 EGP (+20%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 1.74% → 2.37% (+36%, up (good))
   • AOV: 1,588 → 1,725 EGP (+9%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 54%* of the move (helped, +40,807 EGP)  ·  *CPC 32%* of the move (hurt, -6,196 EGP)  ·  *AOV 14%* of the move (helped, +12,193 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +36%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *40,807 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +23%.
     Revenue +193% because spend +138%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255189243110011|Canndy outfit>, its CVR went 50.0%→2.21% on 2,906 EGP spend (~231% of the swing).
